title: T-049 — UI: TEC-044 Allergen Manual Override Audit panel (PARTIAL)
prompt: Build allergen manual override audit panel per §10.7 TEC-044 (PARTIAL — embedded in TEC-012 detail UX:746). Lists override entries (item, allergen, reason, declared_by, timestamp). Reuses `allergen_declaration_modal` override variant at design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:309-347. RED tests/ui/tec-044-override-audit.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-044-override-audit.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Override audit list + opens declaration-modal override variant.
pipeline_inputs.details: Lives as a card on item detail Allergens tab plus an aggregate cross-item view at /technical/allergens/overrides.
acceptance_criteria: Given the panel renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:309-347 (override variant), then the modal opens with reason field required and matches the prototype's primitives — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given an override row, when clicked, then modal opens pre-filled with reason and allergen.
Given user lacks technical.allergens.edit, when override Save attempted, then disabled.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + reason validation.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow Save without manual_override_reason.
